# Releases in 2020 - 2022

Links to PDF-formatted release notes for Spectrum releases prior to version 2022 R3.
For releases 2022 R2 and earlier, PDF-formatted enhancement descriptions are here:

- [Enhancements in Spectrum 2022 R2](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/073dfaf0-f779-11ee-86c7-0242b9b6af66?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rLsc0ZGn56LqNerqa18GKY6JSFYahcul2n_SjgNdXpE&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Enhancements_in_Spectrum_2022_R2.pdf%22)

- [Enhancements in Spectrum 2022 R1](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/863cc1c0-baad-11ec-bd19-42010a800002?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uvVf6aah599iRGEnx_hZ6i0rtoF3ytQAh8uFAjUZDA8&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Enhancements_in_Spectrum_2022_R1.pdf%22)

- [Enhancements in Spectrum 2021 R3](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/af10b380-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..auZmfv_Qr6RCTaaWABjjtzWJyfdRNNd5A_Jjb8KNDeM&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Enhancements_in_Spectrum_2021_R3.pdf%22)

- [Enhancements in Spectrum 2021 R2](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/af7541b0-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HD9rJJSR5MpKOZh-PwyX2rLsHtB_wDnYggb_V6pzWKs&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Enhancements_in_Spectrum_2021_R2.pdf%22)

- [Enhancements in Spectrum 2021 R1](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/b00a07a0-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..MoZTQNsprR82NbEEPhyPCCbCqLsNO_wDIuJOdmOY3Ck&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Enhancements_in_Spectrum_2021_R1.pdf%22)

- [Enhancements in Spectrum 2020 R3](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/b0573d40-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZMiIiVRiJL9tGQc4UhDGfHD0tj0LWBFZlASaqWhCmM0&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Enhancements_in_Spectrum_2020_R3.pdf%22)

- [Enhancements in Spectrum 2020 R2](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/b11695a0-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..eKQJQeWWv6TJjBGLezqYrICH3bOmaVU9Vfz-FBMq14g&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Enhancements_in_Spectrum_2020_R2.pdf%22)

- [Enhancements in Spectrum 2020 R1](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/b1576f30-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1j1LjpKn31rgK6pFmymxCavzyrhz1CvaO6jVXZNi8ro&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Enhancements_in_Spectrum_2020_R1.pdf%22)

For Spectrum versions 2022 R3 and later, release notes are in [What's New in Spectrum](https://help.viewpoint.com/en/spectrum/spectrum/whats-new/).
